```python
def find_all_image_elements(soup):
    image_elements = []
    
    # Find all img tags
    img_tags = soup.find_all('img')
    for img in img_tags:
        image_elements.append({
            'type': 'img',
            'element': img,
            'src': img.get('src', ''),
            'alt': img.get('alt', None),
            'class': img.get('class', []),
            'id': img.get('id', '')
        })
    
    # Find picture elements
    picture_tags = soup.find_all('picture')
    for picture in picture_tags:
        img_in_picture = picture.find('img')
        if img_in_picture:
            image_elements.append({
                'type': 'picture',
                'element': picture,
                'src': img_in_picture.get('src', ''),
                'alt': img_in_picture.get('alt', None),
                'class': img_in_picture.get('class', []),
                'id': img_in_picture.get('id', '')
            })
    
    # Find SVG elements
    svg_tags = soup.find_all('svg')
    for svg in svg_tags:
        # Check for title and desc elements within SVG
        title = svg.find('title')
        desc = svg.find('desc')
        image_elements.append({
            'type': 'svg',
            'element': svg,
            'title': title.text if title else None,
            'desc': desc.text if desc else None,
            'aria-label': svg.get('aria-label', None),
            'role': svg.get('role', '')
        })
    
    # Find elements with background images in style attributes
    elements_with_bg = soup.find_all(style=re.compile(r'background-image'))
    for elem in elements_with_bg:
        style = elem.get('style', '')
        bg_match = re.search(r'background-image:\s*url\(["\']?(.*?)["\']?\)', style)
        if bg_match:
            image_elements.append({
                'type': 'css-background',
                'element': elem,
                'src': bg_match.group(1),
                'class': elem.get('class', []),
                'id': elem.get('id', ''),
                'style': style
            })
    
    # Find video poster images
    video_tags = soup.find_all('video')
    for video in video_tags:
        poster = video.get('poster')
        if poster:
            image_elements.append({
                'type': 'video-poster',
                'element': video,
                'src': poster,
                'alt': video.get('aria-label', None) or video.get('title', None)
            })
    
    return image_elements

if soup:
    all_images = find_all_image_elements(soup)
    print(f"Found {len(all_images)} image-related elements")
else:
```
